case_title: DISCOVER BANK ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD VS. BRUCE LYNN WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST KURTISS A. JACOBS, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-30-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-15-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, BRUCE LYNN DOES  1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-10-2009
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-30-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THERE WQS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING DEC-30-2009 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
